summary: Diff introduces a sessionStorage-backed vetKey mechanism, persists/restores transport keypairs by vetKey, updates Dashboard to expose/copy vetKey and navigate/copy a Compose link including vetKey, and updates Compose to read vetKey from URL/session and initialize transport key access accordingly. No clear missing REQ-1/2/3 items found from the provided diff summary, but there are a couple of additional (unrequested) utilities/diagnostics enhancements.

hallucinated_features.description: Added standalone Base64 utility module for encoding/decoding binary data, but the shown persistence/export logic in transportKeys.ts uses direct btoa/atob conversions and does not reference this utility in the diff summary.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by the BuildRequest; appears to be auxiliary/unused (based on the truncated summaries shown).

hallucinated_features.description: Expanded/copy-to-clipboard JSON diagnostics functionality on dashboard transport key diagnostics and compose send eligibility diagnostics.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest focuses on vetKey persistence and passing vetKey to Compose; diagnostics JSON copy features are not explicitly requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Introduced vetKey lifecycle helpers beyond persistence (e.g., clearActiveVetKey, clearTransportKeyData).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not explicitly requested; REQs only require persistence/retrieval and URL passing. These helpers may be preparatory but are additional scope.
